chapter_title.en: What Defiles Clothing and the Body

text: 154 - وَقَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ لِبَعْضِ نِسَائِهِ «نَاوِلِينِي اَلْخُمْرَةَ» فَقَالَتْ لَهُ أَنَا حَائِضٌ فَقَالَ لَهَا «أَ حَيْضُكِ فِي يَدِكِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.154 - The Messenger of Allah (sw) said to one of his wives:
"Hand me the khumrah (a small prayer mat)."
She replied: "I am menstruating"
He (sw) said: 'Is your menstruation in your hand?'
